From our sister site, The New Stack

Live Webinar: Spotify's Agentic-First Development

Join this webinar on April 29 for a deep dive on what agentic-first development actually looks like in practice at scale, what broke, and how platform engineering principles had to evolve to make it work. You'll learn:

  • How agentic development reshapes team structures and ownership models.

  • Which platform engineering foundations matter most when agents do the work.

  • What Spotify got right (and what surprised them) along the way.
Register to Join

Live Webinar: Spotify's Agentic-First Development

Join this webinar on April 29 for a deep dive on what agentic-first development actually looks like in practice at scale, what broke, and how platform engineering principles had to evolve to make it work. You'll learn:

-

How agentic development reshapes team structures and ownership models.

-

Which platform engineering foundations matter most when agents do the work.

- What Spotify got right (and what surprised them) along the way.
